mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_member (member_id, member_pw, member_name, member_email) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{memberPw}, #{memberName}, #{memberEmail})
mapper.select: SELECT member_id as memberId , member_pw as memberPw , member_name as memberName , member_email as memberEmail FROM t_member WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND member_pw = #{memberPw}
